scripts.dev: ulimit -n 10240 2>/dev/null || true; CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true turbo run dev
scripts.dev:all: pnpm run kill-ports && concurrently "pnpm run dev:dashboard" "pnpm run dev:menu" "pnpm run dev:admin" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:dashboard: pnpm run kill-ports && cd apps/dashboard && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:menu: pnpm run kill-ports && cd apps/menu && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:admin: pnpm run kill-ports && cd apps/admin && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run kill-ports && cd apps/web && pnpm run dev
